heading: Substitute to sign certificates for salary and accounts
label: 5308 Substitute to sign certificates for salary and accounts
text: The Speaker is authorized to designate from time to time some one from among those appointed by him and appropriated for and employed in his office, whose duty it shall be under the direction of the Speaker to sign in his name and for him all certificates required by for salary and accounts for traveling expenses in going to and returning from Congress of Representatives and Delegates.section 5307 of this title
notes: References in Text, referred to in text, was in the original “section forty-seven of the Revised Statutes”, which initially enacted part of and was subsequently reclassified as . See Codification notes under sections 48 and 5307 of this title.Section 5307 of this titlesection 48 of this titlesection 5307 of this title
